assertions.expectation: Uses 'no upgrades' exclusion (30-day max) for the BFCM period — blocks everything including patches
assertions.reason: Response uses '--add-maintenance-exclusion-scope no_upgrades' for BFCM period (Nov 15 - Dec 5, which is 20 days, within the 30-day limit) and correctly notes it blocks all upgrades including patches

assertions.expectation: Uses 'no upgrades' exclusion for the June code freeze period
assertions.reason: Response uses '--add-maintenance-exclusion-scope no_upgrades' for the June code freeze covering the entire month

assertions.expectation: For permanent minor version control: uses 'no minor upgrades' (scope 'no_minor') if they only want to block minor versions, or 'no minor or node upgrades' (scope 'no_minor_or_node') if they also want to stop node upgrades. May recommend persistent exclusion with --add-maintenance-exclusion-until-end-of-support which auto-tracks EoS date
assertions.reason: Response uses '--add-maintenance-exclusion-scope no_minor_upgrades' with '--add-maintenance-exclusion-until-end-of-support' flag for persistent minor version control, correctly implementing the auto-tracking EoS approach

assertions.expectation: Notes the 30-day maximum for 'no upgrades' exclusions vs up-to-EoS for 'no minor or node upgrades'
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states 'no_upgrades exclusions are limited to 30 days max - your BFCM period (20 days) fits within this limit' and shows the persistent exclusion automatically renews

assertions.expectation: Provides specific gcloud commands with --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope flags for each exclusion type
assertions.reason: Response provides complete gcloud commands with specific --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope flags: 'no_minor_upgrades' for persistent control and 'no_upgrades' for time-based freezes

assertions.expectation: Notes that you can have a maximum of three 'no upgrades' exclusions, and they must allow 48h of maintenance in any 32-day window
assertions.reason: Response does not mention the maximum of three 'no upgrades' exclusions or the 48-hour maintenance requirement in any 32-day window

assertions.expectation: Mentions that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows — only auto-upgrades respect them
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states 'Manual upgrades bypass ALL exclusions - you can still upgrade during freeze periods if needed' and shows manual upgrade commands

assertions.expectation: Warns about the risk of falling too far behind on versions during extended exclusion periods
assertions.reason: Response does not warn about the risks of falling behind on versions during extended exclusion periods or mention version support lifecycle concerns
